case_title: MAGNE L VEIMOEN VS. ROBIN FRETTE et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-21-2003 VACATED.
MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218

SETT. CONF.--UNLAWFUL DETAINER HELD WED., 15JAN2003, DEPT. #501-A; A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT IS REACHED AND THE CAUSE SETTLES; JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND STIPULATION OF JUDGMENT BOTH SIGNED BY THE COURT AND PARTIES; TRIAL DATE VACATED; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS FILED. BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT; TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD. JUDGE: PRO TEM JUDGE SCOTT WEAVER; CSR: PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (DEPT. #501-A, WED., JAN. 15, 2003).
